reaction.label: Reaction Under Pressure
reaction.description: I freeze up when I take the first hit

aim.label: Aim
aim.description: I miss a lot when shooting, crosshair is imprecise or shaky

reflex.label: Reflex
reflex.description: I react slowly, I'm slow to draw and shoot

movement.label: Movement
movement.description: I move predictably, I take a lot of bullets

intermediario.label: Intermediate
intermediario.description: I've been playing for a few months, I win some fights

avancado.label: Advanced
avancado.description: I've been playing over a year, I want to refine my technique

aim_difficulty.question: What kind of aim is hardest for you?
aim_difficulty.subtitle: This becomes the focus of your precision drills

close.label: Close Range

reflex_level.question: How do you rate your current reflexes?

medio.label: Average
medio.description: Sometimes I react well, sometimes I don't

rapido.label: Fast
rapido.description: I react well, I want to reach the next level

movement_quality.question: How's your movement during a fight?
movement_quality.subtitle: Your unpredictability sets the intensity of your movement drills

previsivel.label: Predictable

moderado.label: Moderate

imprevisivel.label: Unpredictable
imprevisivel.description: Good movement, I want to combine it with aim

rotina.sensibilidade_tooltip: Set up your GTA V sensitivity — also used by the in-app trainer
rotina.reflexao_placeholder: 📝 Reflection session — jot down what you noticed and what improved today.
rotina.marque_pelo_menos_um: Check off at least one drill to finish
rotina.toast_erro_salvar_sessao: Failed to save session. Check your connection and try again.

tips.aquecimento: Take it easy on each drill. The goal is to activate your muscles and reflexes.
tips.aplicacao_jogo: Play on the GOAT server — each match has its own kill quota and focus. Hit the quota on each one.

focus.aim: Keep your crosshair at head height. Breathe between scenarios and avoid tensing your wrist.
focus.reflex: Don't force the speed — a natural reaction is more effective than a forced one. Consistency first.
focus.movement: Strafe and aim at the same time — practice pre-aiming. Unpredictable movement is your armor.

weapon.pistola: Pistol: precise semi-auto beats spray. Every bullet counts — prioritize headshots.
weapon.rifle: Rifle: control the first-shot kick. A 2–3 round burst is more lethal than full-auto.
weapon.shotgun: Shotgun: close the gap aggressively. Aim center mass and always attack first.
weapon.misto: Multiple weapons: universal crosshair placement applies to all of them — head, always.

weakness.moving_target: Moving enemies: keep the crosshair ahead of the target, not on it.
weakness.headshot: Headshots: adjust your sensitivity — a slower aim makes precise placement easier.
weakness.long_range: Long range: lower sensitivity + breath control during the shot.
weakness.reaction: Under pressure: pre-aim angles before you turn. Whoever's ready shoots first.

level_note.down: Quota adjusted to help you get back into rhythm

duelos_1x1.label: 1v1 duels
duelos_1x1.instrucao: Seek out direct 1v1 fights and close out every duel decisively.

tracking_combate.label: combat tracking
tracking_combate.instrucao: Keep the crosshair on the enemy even when they — or you — are moving.

posicionamento.label: positioning
posicionamento.instrucao: Use angles and cover to win the duel before you even fire.

movement_strafe.label: movement/strafe
movement_strafe.instrucao: Move unpredictably while shooting — never stand still.

game_sense.label: game sense
game_sense.instrucao: Pay attention to sound and enemy positioning before engaging.

servidores.subtitulo: Join the server's Discord to see how to connect and play

trainer.instrucoes: 60 seconds · the mouse is locked to the window (Pointer Lock) — press <bold>ESC</bold> to release it anytime.

tracking_suave.descricao: Keep your crosshair on a target drifting in fluid, unpredictable directions

shot_grid.descricao: Hit static targets that spawn one at a time at random positions

quick_flick.descricao: Flick fast onto targets at varying distances before time runs out

micro_adjust.descricao: Small corrections on targets near your crosshair, short window

nivel_aim.sem_dados: Play each drill at least 5 times to calculate your aim level

resultado.sync_indisponivel: ⚠️ Sync unavailable right now — this result was saved on this device only.

sensitivity_setup.descricao: Training uses your real GTA V sensitivity — the exact same mouse response, count for count.
sensitivity_setup.gta_sens_desc: 0–100 scale · the same one you use in-game
sensitivity_setup.ajuste_fino_desc: Multiplies the converted sensitivity — use this for a small adjustment without touching GTA V.
sensitivity_setup.preview_label: Live preview — move the mouse here

aim_progress.vazio: 🎯 No aim training logged yet. Head to the Trainer and complete your first session!
aim_progress.exercicio_vazio: No sessions logged for this drill yet.

historico.vazio: 📭 No sessions logged yet. Complete your first routine!

sensibilidade.subtitulo: Set up your GTA V sensitivity — the same one used by the in-app trainer
sensibilidade.gta_sens_desc: -100 to 100 scale — the higher, the faster the turn
sensibilidade.config_hint: Set this in GTA V → Options → Controls → Mouse Sensitivity
sensibilidade.usado_pelo_treinador: This setting is used automatically by the in-app trainer.

formula.validado_por: Values validated by the community via mouse-sensitivity.com and r/FPSAimTrainer

sensibilidade.resultado_vazio: Enter your sensitivity and DPI to see the result in real time

muito_rapida.resumo: You turn fast with little arm movement — great for reacting to enemies from any direction. In exchange, fine adjustments and precise shots at range take more control.

agil.resumo: A good balance for fast turns and flicks — in exchange, fine aim on distant targets takes a bit more care.

equilibrada.resumo: The classic balance between turn speed and precision — the most common range among competitive players.
equilibrada.referencia: In the most common range among precision players

controlada.resumo: Your aim favors precision and stability in duels — in exchange, quick turns take more arm movement.

muito_lenta.resumo: Maximum precision and stability on target — in exchange, turning fast or reacting to enemies from behind takes a lot of mousepad space and arm movement.

descoberta.card_descricao: A guided ~4 min test measures your aim and recommends adjusting (or not) your GTA V sensitivity.
descoberta.intro_explicacao: You'll play 5 short rounds using your CURRENT GTA V sensitivity — 3 flick rounds and 2 tracking rounds. At the end, we compare how your flicks and aim behaved and suggest increasing, decreasing, or keeping your sensitivity.
descoberta.intro_ponto_partida: The result is just a starting point — personal comfort always wins.
descoberta.pronto_para_comecar: Ready? The round uses your current sensitivity — lock the mouse to begin.
descoberta.motivo_aumentar: Your flicks fell short of the target in {{pct}}% of attempts.
descoberta.motivo_diminuir: Your flicks overshot the target in {{pct}}% of attempts.
descoberta.motivo_manter: Your flicks and aim were balanced — no clear tendency either way.
descoberta.inconclusivo_detalhe: Only {{count}} valid flicks were recorded — retake the test for a reliable result.
descoberta.lembrete_gta_titulo: Don't forget to change it in GTA V too
descoberta.retestar_dica: Tip: retake the test after playing a few days with the new sensitivity.
